sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value DOUBLE, interval_field INTERVAL, note VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, interval_field, note) VALUES (1, 5.5, INTERVAL 3 HOUR, 'Sample 1'), (2, NULL, INTERVAL 2 DAY, 'Sample 2'), (3, 10.0, INTERVAL 0 HOUR, 'Sample 3');
SELECT id, gamma(value) AS gamma_value, (INTERVAL 1 HOUR - INTERVAL (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) HOUR) AS adjusted_interval FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value, gamma(value - 3.5) AS modified_gamma FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE interval_field IS NOT NULL) HAVING modified_gamma > 5;
WITH value_summary AS (SELECT id, gamma(value) AS gamma_value FROM test_table) SELECT id, gamma_value, (gamma_value + INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AS gamma_with_interval FROM value_summary;
SELECT id, value, (SELECT gamma(COALESCE(value, 0)) FROM test_table WHERE id = t.id) AS coalesced_gamma FROM test_table t;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, value - INTERVAL 2 HOUR AS adjusted_value FROM test_table;
SELECT tt.id, tt.adjusted_value, gamma(tt.adjusted_value + 2.0) FROM temp_table tt WHERE adjusted_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY gamma(value) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT tt.id, (gamma(tt.value) - INTERVAL (SELECT MIN(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL)) AS gamma_diff FROM test_table tt WHERE value < (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table);
